segments.text: Real scary, trying to find some way to go for it, and trying to find some way to do it.
Lammers' backing off, recognizing the time, trying to make Lui$ go into him, not be a little bit more antsy.
Trying to catch Lui$ with the hand in the cookie jar, gets the landing, and brings it to game 5!

full_text: Real scary, trying to find some way to go for it, and trying to find some way to do it. Lammers' backing off, recognizing the time, trying to make Lui$ go into him, not be a little bit more antsy. Trying to catch Lui$ with the hand in the cookie jar, gets the landing, and brings it to game 5!
